creator: nakai@internetsolutions.co.jp
text:
I fixed the snes9x port to follow its latest version.
Now you can build from source code, (thanks to the lang/pgcc port!)
I tried but failed to user the sound feature, so add patch to disable it
of the default options.
Please enjoy...

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
